research.notes: Only 2 videos with untagged traits. No trait comparisons are possible. Hold all research priorities at existing defaults until trait tagging is in place and a larger sample exists.

script.word_count_signal: Hold at 45-75 word contract. No data to justify narrowing the range this week.

visuals.thumbnail_signal: Hold all thumbnail decisions to existing brand rules. Clinical word block remains enforced. No data to support changes.

metadata.title_signal: Both current titles use a quiet, observational register consistent with brand voice. Hold this approach. No data to support changes.
metadata.description_signal: Keep descriptions emotionally accurate and searchable. No data to support changes.

voice.notes: Encode pacing through sentence length and punctuation. No TTS direction changes supported by current data.

thumbnail.primary_variant_rule: Default to variant B. Prefer variant C if thumbnail text passes non-clinical check. Never use variant A.

experiment_slots.notes: No experiments this week. Trait tagging must be operational before experiments can be designed or evaluated.

operational_flags.trait_tagging_gap: All videos this week have unknown traits across every dimension. Trait tagging must be applied at upload before meaningful comparisons are possible.
operational_flags.ctr_gap: CTR is null for all videos. Confirm impressions data is being captured correctly.
operational_flags.comments_per_view: 0.0 this week. Monitor but do not act on a 2-video sample.
